title: Jamaican Chicken Wrap
description: A delicious and flavorful Jamaican-inspired chicken wrap filled with roasted chicken, intensely flavorful spices, and fresh wrap.
instructions: Preheat a pan over medium heat.
In a small bowl, mix together Jamaican jerk seasoning and intensely flavored pepper sauce.
Brush the mixture on the shredded roasted chicken breast.
Add the chicken breast to the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Add shredded carrot and chopped cilantro to the pan and stir.
Warm the flour tortilla in the pan for 30 seconds.
Assemble the wrap by placing the chicken, carrot, and cilantro mixture onto the tortilla.
Fold the bottom half of the tortilla up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the wrap up tightly.
